# url

**Instance Property**

The URL of the sound asset.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property has a value when an app creates the asset with [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEAssetRegistry/registerSoundAsset(url:identifier:assetType:channelLayout:normalizationMode:)]; otherwise the value is `nil`.

## Accessing Sound Data

- **data**: A storage buffer for the sound asset.
